calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-12-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: ELLEN CHAITIN, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. FIELDS, #7235

Petitioner ELFEGO CASTANON (father)was present in pro per as PARENT FOR MINOR ALEXIS DAIR CASTANON DELEON

Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to ALEX DAIR CASTANON DE LEON

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-17-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor. Dept. 514, Judge: ELLEN CHAITIN, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. FIELDS, #7235
Petitioners: Isabel Castanon and Elfego Castanon (mother and father) were present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Alexis Dair Castanon De Leon. Through assistance of Claudia Vazquez-Torres interpreting Spanish language for the Petitioners, matter is ordered off calendar. Petitioners to file an amended OSC with new hearing date and to publish the new OSC date in the newspaper.
